name: Moab Minerals Limited
description: Moab Minerals Limited (ASX:MOM) is an exploration and project development company focused on the identification and advancement of critical mineral assets. The company is currently exploring the REX Uranium-Vanadium Project in Colorado, USA, and holds a majority stake in the Manyoni and Octavo uranium projects in Tanzania. Additionally, Moab Minerals maintains interests in the Speedway Gold Project in Utah, the Highline Copper-Cobalt Project in Nevada, and the Woodlands and Mt Amy projects in Western Australia, alongside an investment in CAA Mining for lithium and gold exploration in Ghana.
